spec_match.rationale: The guide now covers the removed embedded-JPEG/PNG BMP compression values, ChromeStatus security/interoperability/UMA motivation, and direct JPEG/PNG migration path.

interactive.rationale: Visitors can analyze synthetic BI_RGB, BI_JPEG, BI_PNG, BI_ALPHABITFIELDS, unknown, too-short, and non-BMP samples or parse a local file header.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and page H1/lede share the same framing and surface the same API affordances.

edge_cases.rationale: The analyzer exposes malformed input, missing BMP signature, unknown compression, and unaffected adjacent compression values alongside the removed happy path.

references.rationale: see-also section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5153489630134272 so the cleanup script can recover this folder.

design_system.rationale: The new analyzer uses shared CSS variables, paired button background and color, responsive grids, and textContent-based output instead of a static-card pattern.

summary: Converted the static format guide into an interactive BMP header analyzer that demonstrates the removed BI_JPEG/BI_PNG paths, adjacent safe values, malformed inputs, ChromeStatus removal rationale, and migration guidance.
